images.caption: Figure 1:(a)Training dynamics: NPO’s early-stage intervention accelerates convergence by∼2.1×{\sim}2.1{\times}, while the late-stage intervention pushes beyond the vanilla GRPO plateau to a higher ceiling. AutoNPO unifies both interventions by triggering them automatically from online training signals.(b)Benchmark performance: NPO and AutoNPO consistently outperform GRPO and the best existing baseline across representative reasoning benchmarks.

Figure 2:Quality–stability trade-off and the effective learning signal𝒮​(Δ)\mathcal{S}(\Delta).(a)For each source, thedotmarks its position on these two axes, the surrounding shadeddiskvisualizes the magnitude of its variance costVV(larger disk, largerVV), and thetrianglemarks the portion of the trajectory quality that is effectively usable under the variance cost it induces. NPO targets the high-𝒮\mathcal{S}region in the upper-right of the plane.(b)Q​(Δ)Q(\Delta)(blue) andV​(Δ)V(\Delta)(red) measured on a vanilla GRPO run with Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct:QQrises concavely whileVVgrows exponentially.(c)The ratio𝒮​(Δ)\mathcal{S}(\Delta)exhibits a clear interior maximum for both anchorsT=0T{=}0andT=50T{=}50, confirming the predicted U-shape.

Figure 3:Overview of NPO and AutoNPO.Right:NPO mechanism (§3.1): a near-future policyπF\pi_{F}supplies a verified guidance trajectoryox′o_{x}^{\prime}for each prompt, which replaces one slot of the on-policy rollout group whenever the current policyπθ\pi_{\theta}is struggling onxx.Left:AutoNPO (§3.3): online signals (reward stagnation, entropy drop, a mistake pool, a capability probe, and an estimated effective signal𝒮\mathcal{S}) jointly decidewhento intervene andhow farto roll back.

Figure 4:Training dynamics of (Auto)NPO compared with vanilla GRPO.Red shaded regionsin panels (a) and (b) highlight AutoNPO’s intervention windows.(a)Training reward dynamics: AutoNPO stays above GRPO throughout, with the gap widening step-wise after each intervention window.(b)Generation entropy: GRPO undergoes a steady entropy collapse, while AutoNPO’s interventions actively re-expand exploration and preserve a substantially higher-entropy policy.(c)IS-correction ablation on the late-stage intervention: the two NPO variants with and without exact importance-sampling correction both clearly outperform GRPO, indicating that IS correction is marginal for NPO. Thick lines are smoothed curves; thin lines show raw logged values.
